name: Reminder
tagline: Fires exact-time alarms that ring and vibrate even from a locked screen.
about: Reminder behaves like an alarm clock, not a gentle notification nudge -- built for things you can't afford to miss. It rings and vibrates on a full-screen lock-screen alarm, offers Complete, Dismiss, and Snooze actions right from that screen, and supports daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly repeat rules with category organization. Sign in with Google to sync reminders and attached photos across devices via Drive.
requirements: Android 8.0 (Oreo) or newer. Distributed outside the Play Store -- Android will ask permission to install from this source the first time.

screenshots.alt: Home screen with today's reminders, greeting, and next reminder preview
Navigation drawer with Settings, History, Sync history, and categories
New reminder editor with priority, category, date, time, and repeat rule
Settings screen with account, sync, and about sections

name: Cards
tagline: Offline, biometric-locked vault for your credit and debit cards.
about: Cards scans the front and back of your credit and debit cards, extracts the details with on-device OCR, and stores both the structured data and the encrypted card images in a fully encrypted, biometric-locked local vault. There is no cloud, no account, and no analytics -- the app makes exactly one network call, ever: an optional, user-initiated check for a new version. CVV is never stored by default.
requirements: Android 8.0 (Oreo) or newer. Distributed outside the Play Store -- Android will ask permission to install from this source the first time.

name: AI Scanner
tagline: Pre-release: finds anything in your screenshots with on-device AI summaries and semantic search.
about: AI Scanner automatically finds new screenshots on your phone, extracts their text with on-device OCR, and writes an on-device AI summary for each one -- so you can later search by meaning ("headache medicine") and not just literal words. You can also share links into it, which get captured and summarized the same way. Every model runs entirely on-device (Gemma 3 1B for summaries, Gecko for search embeddings) -- there is no cloud, no account, and no analytics. This is an early pre-release: expect rough edges.
requirements: Android 8.0 (Oreo) or newer. Distributed outside the Play Store -- Android will ask permission to install from this source the first time. Large download (~950MB) -- the on-device AI models are bundled in the app so it works fully offline after install.

name: TwinClean
tagline: Finds exact duplicate files and lets you clean them safely.
about: TwinClean scans your device for exact duplicate files across photos, videos, audio and documents, grouping every match so you can review before cleaning. Every match is verified with a full SHA-256 checksum over the whole file -- identical content is the only thing that matches, never "similar looking" -- and Smart Select keeps the newest, best copy by default. Every file can be opened directly from the app to double-check before cleaning, and each duplicate group shows the exact evidence used to match it (size, checksum, byte-for-byte comparison). Cleaning moves files to an in-app Trash (restorable for 30 days) with single-file, whole-group, or restore-everything options, never deletes originals outright. The app checks for new versions on launch and installs updates directly in-app. There is no cloud, no account, and no analytics.
requirements: Android 8.0 (Oreo) or newer. Distributed outside the Play Store -- Android will ask permission to install from this source the first time.
